query: SELECT a.id, a.titulo, a.macroId, cm.nome as macroNome FROM acoes a LEFT JOIN competencias_macros cm ON a.macroId = cm.id WHERE a.pdiId IN (SELECT id FROM pdis WHERE colaboradorId = 840001);
